about-me-content:
Skilled software developer with a passion for creating innovative solutions.
Strong foundation in multiple programming languages and technologies.
Focused on creating intuitive and user-friendly user interfaces.
Experienced in building web applications from front to back end, and dedicated to delivering high-quality, reliable, and efficient code, whether working on a team or independently.
bento-description: I craft pixel-perfect websites and applications with a focus on motion, aesthetic, and usability.
